differential_diagnoses: Nutritional optic neuropathy (e.g., Vitamin B12, folate, or copper deficiency)
next_steps: Obtain serum levels of vitamins A, B12, C, E, D, folate, zinc, and copper
Initiate emergent supplementation of Vitamin A following WHO protocols for xerophthalmia
Consult pediatric ophthalmology for formal assessment of corneal and conjunctival status
Perform a comprehensive dietary assessment by a registered dietitian
Consult pediatric nutrition and gastroenterology to manage severe selective eating/ARFID
Obtain CBC, metabolic panel, and coagulation studies to evaluate for additional micronutrient-related hematologic effects
